Merge pull request #114187 from bruvzg/menu_perpop_cr

Fix `PopupMenu::_pre_popup` crash outside the tree.

ranked_scenarios.summary: [GraphEdit] Do not scale popup menus in the graph elements when zoomed.

description.text: ### Tested versions 4.5 beta3. I first noticed it in one of 4.5 dev versions. ### System information Godot v4.5.beta (c6d130abd) - Windows 10 (build 19045) - Multi-window, 1 monitor - Vulkan (Forward+) - dedicated AMD Radeon RX 580 2048SP (Advanced Micro Devices, Inc.; 31.0.21923.1000) - Intel(R) Core(TM) i5-7500 CPU @ 3.40GHz (4 threads) - 15.96 GiB memory ### Issue description Zoom level 207% Zoom level 60% The difference in size of the dropdown menu is distracting. ### Steps to reproduce Open texture2d's dropdown menu ### Minimal reproduction project (MRP) No need
